[September Update Celebration Special Gift]

Sensei! To make the time we shared even more special, we have prepared a gift for you!

Please log in during the period below and claim your reward from your Mailbox! 🎁

➡️ Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3218&thread=3140479
